title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3 (a world model), Vera (an agent CPU layer), and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot reference platform, forming a complete physical AI stack. Cosmos 3 trains on video, audio, text, and action data to enable robots to understand and interact with the physical world.
